'''Gokobs''' were a [[Species/Legends|species]] of friendly, hairless [[Rodent/Legends|rodents]] found in the canopies of the forests of [[Ossus/Legends|Ossus]]. When frightened, they sprayed a stinking mist. Gokobs spent much of their [[Time/Legends|time]] scavenging off food scraps and [[potam]]s from the [[Jedi Academy (Ossus)|Jedi academy]] kitchens.

Many escaped offworld, stowing aboard the many [[Starship/Legends|ships]] departing from the Academy during the [[New Jedi Order]]'s use of it.

==Appearances==
*''[[Coruscant Nights II: Street of Shadows]]'' {{Mo}}
*''[[Legacy of the Force: Inferno]]'' {{1stm}}

==Sources==
*<!-- 2008-12-09 -->''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]''
